isolation.note: Unit tests are self-contained, no special isolation needed

assertions.title: 双击歌曲列表项触发播放

steps.expected: Test passes: first click sends PlaylistTracksMoveTo, second click sends PlaylistTracksPlaySelected
steps.observed: Test passed. First click sent PlaylistTracksMoveTo { index: 1 }, second click sent PlaylistTracksPlaySelected.

steps.expected: Test passes: DoubleClickDetector returns false on first click, true on second click for same panel+item
steps.observed: Test passed. Detector correctly identified double-click on same item.

assertions.title: 双击搜索结果触发播放

steps.expected: Test passes: first click sends SearchMoveTo, second click sends SearchPlaySelected
steps.observed: Test passed. First click sent SearchMoveTo { index: 2 }, second click sent SearchPlaySelected.

assertions.title: 跨面板点击不误触发双击

steps.expected: Test passes: clicking left panel then center panel does NOT trigger play command
steps.observed: Test passed. First click sent PlaylistsMoveTo { index: 0 }, second click sent PlaylistTracksMoveTo { index: 0 } (select only, no play). No play command was sent.

summary: Tested 3 assertions (4 tests total): all passed. VAL-MOUSE-004 verified by double_click_playlist_tracks_plays_selected and double_click_detector_same_item_double_click. VAL-MOUSE-005 verified by double_click_search_result_plays_selected. VAL-MOUSE-013 verified by cross_panel_clicks_do_not_trigger_double_click.
